title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXII. Natural History.
content:
"Robert Barnes, fellow fine,
        Can you shoe this horse of mine?"
        "Yes, good sir, that I can,
        As well as any other man:
        There's a nail, and there's a prod,
        And now, good sir, your horse is shod."
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXXII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
